Title: Verify Data Organizer accesses Firebase components
Preconditions: The Data Organizer component is initialized and ready to use.
Test Steps:
1. The Data Organizer component attempts to access Firebase.
2. The Data Organizer component accesses the Realtime database.
3. The Data Organizer component accesses the Authentication service.
4. The Data Organizer component accesses the Firebase database.

Title: Verify Data Organizer accesses Data Organizer components
Preconditions: The Data Organizer component is initialized and ready to use.
Test Steps: 1. The Data Organizer component attempts to access itself.

Title: Verify ChangeFragment(0) removes product from Firebase Database
Preconditions: The Main Schema, Refrigerator Fragment, and Firebase Database components are initialized.
Test Steps:
1. The Main Schema calls ChangeFragment(0) on the Refrigerator Fragment.
2. The Refrigerator Fragment removes the product.
3. The Refrigerator Fragment communicates with the Firebase Database to update the product information.
Expected Result: The product is removed from the Firebase Database.
